headline: M. Susan Hardwick Joins Edison International, Southern California Edison Boards of Directors
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., April 23, 2026--Edison International (NYSE: EIX) and Southern California Edison announced that, effective today, M. Susan Hardwick has been elected by the boards of directors of each company to serve as an independent director of both companies.

headline: Will Edison International (EIX) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Edison International (EIX) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: CenterPoint Energy Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: CNP's Q1 earnings and revenues miss estimates despite year-over-year growth, while higher expenses and rising debt shape its financial outlook.
